reasoning: Strong timing-based CBC padding oracle with multiple defensive layers: IV bit-rotation, custom position-dependent XOR padding, PoW rate-limiting, and unified error responses forcing a timing side-channel (~15-25ms PBKDF2 delta). Excellent flag isolation with build-time encryption and source cleanup. Docked on code_quality because the intended solution description references distinct error codes (ERR_DSAS_002/001) that the actual implementation deliberately hides behind a unified 400 response — the real oracle is timing-based, which is more sophisticated than described. At difficulty 2.0, the combination of timing oracle + custom padding + IV rotation is well-calibrated: harder than textbook padding oracle but achievable with source code access to crypto_utils.py.
